about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in creating unforgettable travel experiences
about.heroImageAlt: Travelers on desert dunes at sunset with colorful Moroccan scarves, facing the vast sand horizon
about.missionLead: We design journeys that feel personal, safe, and unforgettable — from the first idea to the last sunset.
about.experienceSubtitle: Desert camps, ancient medinas, and coastlines — brought to life with local experts.
about.valuesIntro: What guides every itinerary and every partner we choose.
about.collageAltMain: Group with local guides at a Moroccan oasis, palm grove and mountains
about.collageAltSecondary: Luxury desert camp at night, lanterns and red carpet to a traditional tent
about.collageAltTertiary: Travelers at a mountain viewpoint in Morocco
about.inspireQuote: Travel is the only thing you buy that makes you richer. We're here to make that richness real.
about.statsSectionSubtitle: Live counts from our catalog, traveler ratings across our tours, and TripAdvisor recognition.
about.statAvgRatingSuffix: Across reviewed tours on this site
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse hand-picked tours, compare dates, and book with confidence — we're with you at every step.
about.trustedPartner: Your trusted partner in creating extraordinary travel experiences since 2018.
about.bornFromAdventure: Born from a Love of Adventure
about.storyText1: Morocco Mosaic was founded by passionate travelers who believed extraordinary experiences should be accessible to everyone. What started as a small collection of curated adventures has grown into a global platform connecting travelers with the world's most remarkable experiences.
about.storyText2: Today, we partner with over 500 local experts across 50+ countries to bring you authentic, unforgettable experiences that go beyond typical tourism.
about.passionDesc: Every experience we offer is crafted by people who live and breathe travel.
about.safetyDesc: All our partners meet the highest safety and quality standards.
about.sustainableDesc: We're committed to responsible travel that benefits local communities.
about.excellenceDesc: Award-winning service recognized by travel industry leaders worldwide.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.name: Name
contact.sentToAdmin: Your message has been saved. Our team will reply soon.
contact.mailClientHint: Your email app should open with a pre-filled message. Send it from there. Otherwise, use the address in Get in Touch.
contact.fillAllFields: Please fill in all fields before sending.
contact.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.haveQuestion: Have a question or need help planning your adventure? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.faqBook: How do I book an activity?
contact.faqBookAnswer: Browse our activities, select one you love, choose your preferred date and number of guests, then click 'Reserve Now'. You'll receive a confirmation email with all the details.
contact.faqCancelAnswer: Most activities offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before the experience. Check individual activity pages for specific cancellation policies.
contact.faqChildren: Are the activities suitable for children?
contact.faqChildrenAnswer: Many of our activities are family-friendly! Check the difficulty level and age requirements on each activity page. Activities marked 'Easy' are generally suitable for all ages.
contact.faqInsuranceAnswer: We strongly recommend travel insurance for all our experiences. While some activities include basic insurance, comprehensive coverage for your entire trip is advisable.
contact.faqGuide: How can I contact my guide?
contact.faqGuideAnswer: After booking, you'll receive your guide's contact information via email. You can also reach them through our in-app messaging system.

activities.title: Activities
activities.fillForm: Fill in the form below to add a new activity to your platform
activities.essentialDetails: Essential details about your activity. Fields marked with * are required.
activities.chooseLocation: Choose the location where this activity takes place
activities.typeOfActivity: Type of activity (e.g., Adventure, Culture, Nature, Beach)
activities.howLong: How long the activity lasts (e.g., '3 hours', 'Full day')
activities.physicalDifficulty: Physical difficulty level of the activity
activities.tourTypeHelper: Shared tours are group tours, private tours are exclusive to your booking
activities.provideDetails: Provide detailed information about your activity. You can add translations in multiple languages using the tabs below.
activities.catchyTitle: A catchy title that describes your activity (50-100 characters recommended)
activities.briefSummary: A brief summary (1-2 sentences) that appears in activity listings
activities.briefOverview: Brief overview shown in search results and cards (100-200 characters)
activities.detailedInfo: Detailed information about the activity, what makes it special, highlights, etc.
activities.completeDescription: Complete description with all details, highlights, and what visitors can expect
activities.specificLocation: Specific location or meeting point for the activity
activities.describeExperience: Describe what participants will experience during this activity
activities.helpVisitors: Help visitors understand what they'll experience (sights, activities, highlights)
activities.whenArrive: When participants should arrive (e.g., '9:00 AM' or 'Flexible')
activities.whenAvailable: When this activity is available (e.g., 'Daily', 'Weekends only')
activities.uploadQuality: Upload high-quality images to showcase your activity. The first image will be used as the main cover image.
activities.dropImages: Drop images here or click to upload
activities.supportsFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP (max 10MB per file)
activities.firstImageCover: First image is the cover photo
activities.setWhenAvailable: Set when this activity is available. You can select multiple dates.
activities.selectAllDates: Select all dates when this activity is available. Leave empty if available all year.
activities.provideItinerary: Provide itinerary, what's included, and other helpful information for visitors.
activities.itineraryPlaceholder: Enter each step or time slot on a new line
activities.listSteps: List each step or time slot on a separate line. Visitors will see this as a step-by-step guide.
activities.whatsIncludedPlaceholder: Enter each item on a new line
activities.listEverything: List everything included in the activity price, one item per line (e.g., guide, meals, equipment)
activities.embedUrl: Embed URL from Google Maps or other mapping services to show location on the activity page
activities.reviewCreate: Review all information and click 'Create Activity' to publish
activities.reviewUpdate: Review your changes and click 'Update Activity' to save
activities.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this activity?

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.manageListings: Manage your destination listings and translations
destinations.createNew: Create a new destination for your tourism platform
destinations.provideDetails: Provide detailed information about your destination. You can add translations in multiple languages using the tabs below.
destinations.briefSummary: A brief summary (1-2 sentences) that appears in destination listings
destinations.detailedInfo: Detailed information about the destination, what makes it special, highlights, etc.
destinations.uploadQuality: Upload a high-quality image for this destination
destinations.dropImage: Drop image here or click to upload
destinations.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the destination
destinations.deleteConfirmDetails: This action cannot be undone and will also delete all associated translations.
destinations.getStarted: Get started by creating your first destination
